overview: TRU-Hormones provides personalized, non-invasive medical treatments focusing on comprehensive health evaluation, hormone and vitamin deficiencies, and age-related concerns. Dr. Michelle Tulla, a board-certified gynecologist and anti-aging specialist, delivers bio-identical hormone therapy, weight loss programs, and aesthetic treatments.
highlights: Advanced skin resurfacing treatments including AgeJET plasma therapy
targetAudience: Both women and men seeking to optimize hormone profiles and address age-related health and aesthetic concerns.
